title: aconitum refractum
intro: Aconitum refractum, also known as the white monk's hood or white aconitum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating pain, swelling, and infections. The health benefits of Aconitum refractum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antitumor activities. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, although it is essential to exercise caution when handling and using Aconitum refractum due to its toxic nature.
